Arachnothryx ricoae is native to Central America and is found in regions with tropical and subtropical climates. The Rubiaceae family, also known as the coffee or madder family, comprises over 600 genera of flowering plants. Arachnothryx ricoae's classification places it within the larger group of flowering plants known as angiosperms.
